name: 暗影双匕（★） | 深红之网
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 深红之网
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been painted using a spider web-patterned hydrographic over a red base coat and finished with a semi-gloss topcoat. Be careful where you walk, you never know where the web is spread
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器以红色为外表，使用蜘蛛网图案的花纹进行了涂装，完毕后再配上了半光的表层。 留意你的脚步，你永远都不会知道蛛网撒在何处
